mapper.sql: fd.id, fd.dept_name, fd.parent_id, fd.enabled_flag, fd.dept_code, fd.dept_level, fd.dept_sequence, fd.deleted_flag, fd.create_time, fd.create_by, fd.update_time, fd.update_by, fd.ext_dept_id, fd.ext_department_id, fd.ext_team_id, fd.admin_job_id , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id) ext_dept_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id) ext_department_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id) ext_team_name

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.parent_id as ${tAlias}_parent_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.dept_code as ${tAlias}_dept_code, ${tAlias}.dept_level as ${tAlias}_dept_level, ${tAlias}.dept_sequence as ${tAlias}_dept_sequence,${tAlias}.deleted_flag as ${tAlias}_deleted_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.ext_dept_id as ${tAlias}_ext_dept_id, ${tAlias}.ext_department_id as ${tAlias}_ext_department_id, ${tAlias}.ext_team_id as ${tAlias}_ext_team_id, ${tAlias}.admin_job_id as ${tAlias}_admin_job_id , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy1 where fdcopy1.id = fd.ext_dept_id) fd_ext_dept_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy2 where fdcopy2.id = fd.ext_department_id) fd_ext_department_name , (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdcopy3 where fdcopy3.id = fd.ext_team_id) fd_ext_team_name
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_dept (dept_name, parent_id, enabled_flag, dept_code, dept_level, dept_sequence, deleted_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, ext_dept_id, ext_department_id, ext_team_id,admin_job_id ) values (#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptSequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deletedFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{extDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extDepartmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extTeamId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_dept set dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, dept_code = #{deptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_level = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_sequence = #{deptSequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ext_dept_id = #{extDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ext_department_id = #{extDepartmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ext_team_id = #{extTeamId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin_job_id = #{adminJobId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: where fd.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by fd.dept_sequence
where fd.parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and fd.deleted_flag = 0 order by fd.dept_sequence

WITH cte AS (SELECT
FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} --查询当前部门 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT
FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN cte cte_pa ON fd.parent_id = cte_pa.id AND fd.deleted_flag = 0) SELECT * FROM cte

select
from fnd_dept fd left outer join fnd_roles_depts frd on fd.id = frd.dept_id left outer join fnd_role fr on frd.role_id = fr.id where fr.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by fd.id

select
DATEDIFF(YEAR, pe.birthday , getdate() ) from pm_employee pe, pm_employee_job pej where pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.dept_id in
#{item, jdbcType = BIGINT}
order by 1

select isNull(pe.occupation_category, '无') as name , count(pe.occupation_category) as value from pm_employee pe, pm_employee_job pej
where
pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.dept_id in
#{item, jdbcType = BIGINT}
group by pe.occupation_category

select isNull(pe.occupation_type, '无') as name , count(isNull(pe.occupation_type, '无')) as value from pm_employee pe, pm_employee_job pej
where
pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.employee_id = pe.id and pej.dept_id in
#{item, jdbcType = BIGINT}
group by pe.occupation_type
mapper.update: WITH cte AS (SELECT fd.* FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} --查询当前部门 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT fd.* FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN cte cte_pa ON fd.parent_id = cte_pa.id AND fd.deleted_flag = 0) UPDATE fd SET fd.ext_dept_id = ISNULL (fd_dept.id, -1), fd.ext_department_id = ISNULL (fd_department.id, -1), fd.ext_team_id = ISNULL (fd_team.id, -1) FROM fnd_dept fd JOIN cte ON fd.id = cte.id OUTER apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(fd.id, '部', '部门', '-') fd_dept OUTER apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(fd.id, '科室', '-', '-') fd_department OUTER apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(fd.id, '班组', '-', '-') fd_team WHERE fd.ext_dept_id != ISNULL (fd_dept.id, -1) OR fd.ext_department_id != ISNULL (fd_department.id, -1) OR fd.ext_team_id != ISNULL (fd_team.id, -1)
mapper.select:
select
from fnd_dept fd left outer join fnd_job_dept fjd on fd.id = fjd.dept_id left outer join fnd_job fj on fjd.job_id = fj.id where fj.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by fd.id
select max(dept_sequence) maxSequence from fnd_dept where deleted_flag = 0 and parent_id = #{pId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select top 1
from fnd_dept fd where fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.dept_name = '公司领导' order by fd.id

select fd.* from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_dept fd on pej.job_id = fd.admin_job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and pej.employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} order by fd.id

select
,
,
from fnd_dept fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id left join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.username = pe.work_card where fd.id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and pe.enabled_flag =1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag =1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0

where 1 =1
and fd.id = #{criteria.deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT}

select fd.id, fd.dept_name, fd.parent_id, fd.enabled_flag, fd.dept_code, fd.dept_level, fd.dept_sequence, fd.deleted_flag, fd.create_time, fd.create_by, fd.update_time, fd.update_by, fd.ext_dept_id, fd.ext_department_id, fd.ext_team_id, (case isnull(pej.employee_id,-1) when -1 then -1 else fd.admin_job_id end) admin_job_id from fnd_dept fd left join pm_employee_job pej on pej.job_id = fd.admin_job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 order by fd.id

select
,
from fnd_dept fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and fd.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: WITH cte AS ( SELECT fd.* FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} --查询当前部门 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT fd.* FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN cte cte_pa ON fd.parent_id = cte_pa.id AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 ) SELECT cte.*, ext_dept.dept_name AS ext_dept_name, ext_department.dept_name AS ext_department_name, ext_team.dept_name AS ext_team_name INTO fnd_dept_temp_${timestamp} FROM cte LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_dept ON cte.ext_dept_id = ext_dept.id AND ext_dept.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_department ON cte.ext_department_id = ext_department.id AND ext_department.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_team ON cte.ext_team_id = ext_team.id AND ext_team.enabled_flag = 1

INSERT INTO pm_employee_job_transfer (group_id, employee_id, old_job_id, old_job_name, old_dept_id, old_dept_name, new_job_id, new_job_name, new_dept_id, new_dept_name, remarks, start_time, transfer_reason, transfer_state, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, transfer_type, old_ext_dept_name , old_ext_department_name, old_ext_team_name, new_ext_dept_name, new_ext_department_name, new_ext_team_name) SELECT pej.group_id, pej.employee_id, pej.job_id, pej.job_name, fdt.id, fdt.dept_name, pej.job_id, pej.job_name, fd.id, fd.dept_name, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '机构调整', 'FINISHED', 1 , #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, '机构调整', fdt.ext_dept_name, fdt.ext_department_name, fdt.ext_team_name, ext_dept.dept_name , ext_department.dept_name, ext_team.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fd JOIN fnd_dept_temp_${timestamp} fdt ON fd.id = fdt.id JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_dept ON fd.ext_dept_id = ext_dept.id AND ext_dept.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_department ON fd.ext_department_id = ext_department.id AND ext_department.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_dept ext_team ON fd.ext_team_id = ext_team.id AND ext_team.enabled_flag = 1 WHERE isnull(ext_dept.dept_name, '---') != Isnull(fdt.ext_dept_name, '---') OR isnull(ext_department.dept_name, '---') != Isnull(fdt.ext_department_name, '---') OR isnull(ext_team.dept_name, '---') != Isnull(fdt.ext_team_name, '---')
